title: Comment
description: Represents a comment on a Confluence page or blog post.

id.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

status.description: The current status of the comment.

title.description: The title of the comment (typically auto-generated).

blogPostId.description: The ID of the blog post the comment is on, if applicable.

pageId.description: The ID of the page the comment is on, if applicable.

parentCommentId.description: The ID of the parent comment, if this is a reply.

authorId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the comment author.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the comment was created.
